case_title: ARTISANS LANDSCAPE, INC. VS. BOBBY WARD

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-19-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, BOBBY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARTISANS LANDSCAPE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARD, BOBBY $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, BOBBY

DECLARATION FROM JUDGMENT DEBTOR REGARDING PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CHECK ORIGINALLY MAILED ON JAN-04-10 AND CLEARED ON JAN-07-10. JUDGMENT CREDITOR FAILED TO NOTIFY COURT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT UNTIL JAN-20-11.COPY OF CANCELLED CHECK ATTACHED; FILED BY DEFENDANT WARD, BOBBY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARTISANS LANDSCAPE, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF BY RICHARD B. ULMER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
